UI_trait_NL_ByakuganDesc: Possesses the Byakugan, enhancing perception, foraging, and Gentle Fist.
UI_trait_NL_SharinganDesc: Possesses the Sharingan, which evolves through combat and consumes chakra while active.
UI_trait_NL_SenjuDesc: Possesses exceptional vitality, chakra reserves, and Wood Release.
UI_trait_NL_RinneganDesc: Possesses the Rinnegan, enhancing perception and granting Shinra Tensei.
UI_trait_NL_UzumakiDesc: Possesses exceptional durability, chakra reserves, and sealing techniques.
UI_NL_Ability_Healing_Desc: Heals the most damaged body part at the cost of chakra.
UI_NL_Ability_PhysicalReinforcement_Desc: Temporarily reduces fatigue and restores endurance.
UI_NL_Ability_ChakraFocus_Desc: Focuses chakra to reduce panic and stress.
UI_NL_Ability_Byakugan_Desc: Toggle Byakugan: Greatly expands perception and vision.
UI_NL_Ability_Sharingan_Desc: Toggle Sharingan: Evolve through combat to dodge attacks.
UI_NL_Ability_Kamui_Desc: Phase out of danger for a short time.
UI_NL_Ability_ShinraTensei_Desc: Repel nearby zombies with overwhelming force.
UI_NL_Ability_BindingRoots_Desc: Mokuton: Bind and stagger nearby zombies.
UI_NL_Ability_CreationRebirth_Desc: Rapidly heals wounds at a severe chakra cost.
UI_NL_CreationRebirthStudyFailed: The secrets of Creation Rebirth remain beyond your grasp
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_ShinraTensei: Not enough chakra for Shinra Tensei
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_BindingRoots: Not enough chakra for Binding Roots
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_CreationRebi: Too exhausted (low chakra) for Creation Rebirth
UI_NL_Error_CreationRebirthLocked: Creation Rebirth has not been mastered
UI_NL_Error_CreationRebirthMaxChakra: At least 500 maximum chakra is required to study Creation Rebirth
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_PlaceAlarmSe: Not enough chakra to place Alarm Seal
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_StorageSeal: Not enough chakra for Storage Seal
UI_NL_Error_AbilityRequestTimedOut: The server did not confirm the technique.
UI_NL_HandSigns_ClassicDisabled: Enter this sequence on the numeric keypad
UI_NL_HandSigns_Busy: Cannot perform hand signs right now
UI_NL_Moodle_Chakra_Low_Desc: Your chakra is low (<30%). Consider meditating.
UI_NL_Moodle_Chakra_Critical_Desc: Your chakra is critical (<10%). Sustained powers will fail soon.
UI_NL_Moodle_Mangekyo_Desc: Mangekyo Sharingan awakened. Kamui is available.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L1_Desc: Kamui has strained your vision. Recovery: 1 in-game hour.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L2_Desc: Repeated Kamui use has damaged your vision. Recovery: 6 in-game hours.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L3_Desc: Kamui overuse has severely damaged your vision. Recovery: 1 full in-game day.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L4_Desc: Kamui overuse has severely damaged your vision. Recovery: 1 full in-game day.
UI_NL_Error_JutsuNotLearned: You have not completed training for this technique.
UI_NL_Error_NoFacingTarget: No valid target is in front of you.
UI_NL_Discipline_Genjutsu_Desc: Deception, stealth, misdirection, fear, and psychological pressure.
UI_NL_Discipline_Ninjutsu_Desc: General chakra techniques, body enhancement, and practical combat casting.
UI_NL_Discipline_Taijutsu_Desc: Body mastery, conditioning, endurance, and direct movement.
UI_NL_Discipline_Kenjutsu_Desc: Weapon discipline, training, maintenance, and battlefield reliability.
UI_NL_Discipline_Medical_Desc: Healing, wound control, stabilization, and precise body disruption.
UI_NL_Discipline_Fuinjutsu_Desc: Seals, preparation, alarms, storage, and controlled utility.
UI_NL_Discipline_ChakraTransformation_De: You do not yet understand how to transform chakra. Perhaps something in the ninja world can reveal this path.
UI_NL_Node_quiet_step_Desc: Reduce your presence and movement noise for a short time.
UI_NL_Node_false_sound_Desc: Create a misleading sound ahead of you to draw zombies away.
UI_NL_Node_veil_presence_Desc: Conceal your presence and redirect nearby attention.
UI_NL_Node_killing_intent_Desc: Release hostile intent that interrupts nearby enemies.
UI_NL_Node_physical_reinforcement_Desc: Reinforce your body to resist fatigue and recover endurance.
UI_NL_Node_chakra_focus_Desc: Stabilize your mind and reduce panic and stress.
UI_NL_Node_chakra_grip_Desc: Reinforce your grip and close-quarters stability.
UI_NL_Node_chakra_burst_Desc: Strike one facing target with a damaging chakra impact.
UI_NL_Node_pressure_point_pulse_Desc: Disrupt a facing target and a very small nearby cluster.
UI_NL_Node_shadow_close_Desc: Close distance rapidly while leaving a misleading sound behind.
UI_NL_Node_strength_chunin_Desc: Strength develops faster and shoves become more reliable.
UI_NL_Node_fitness_chunin_Desc: Fitness develops faster and endurance recovery improves.
UI_NL_Node_combat_body_chunin_Desc: Pain and exhaustion interfere less with movement.
UI_NL_Node_combat_body_jonin_Desc: Remain combat-capable longer during extended fights.
UI_NL_Node_blade_genin_Desc: Long and short blade skills develop slightly faster.
UI_NL_Node_blade_chunin_Desc: Long and short blade skills develop faster.
UI_NL_Node_blade_jonin_Desc: Long and short blade skills develop significantly faster.
UI_NL_Node_blunt_genin_Desc: Long and short blunt skills develop slightly faster.
UI_NL_Node_blunt_chunin_Desc: Long and short blunt skills develop faster.
UI_NL_Node_blunt_jonin_Desc: Long and short blunt skills develop significantly faster.
UI_NL_Node_polearm_genin_Desc: Axe and spear skills develop slightly faster.
UI_NL_Node_polearm_chunin_Desc: Axe and spear skills develop faster.
UI_NL_Node_polearm_jonin_Desc: Axe and spear skills develop significantly faster.
UI_NL_Node_maintenance_chunin_Desc: Maintenance develops faster and weapons become more reliable.
UI_NL_Node_maintenance_jonin_Desc: Maintenance develops significantly faster and weapons last longer.
UI_NL_Node_minor_healing_Desc: Repair light wounds and improve minor injury recovery.
UI_NL_Node_chakra_needle_Desc: Strike one facing target with precise medical chakra.
UI_NL_Node_cell_stimulation_Desc: Reduce fatigue and pain through accelerated recovery.
UI_NL_Node_nervous_system_shock_Desc: Damage and heavily disrupt one facing target.
UI_NL_Node_field_surgery_Desc: Stabilize a major wound and apply a disposable chakra bandage.
UI_NL_Node_bleeding_suppression_Desc: Stop active bleeding and temporarily prevent renewed blood loss.
UI_NL_Node_alarm_seal_Desc: Prepare one-shot seals that warn their owner when zombies enter the area.
UI_NL_Node_storage_seal_Desc: Seal one container and its contents into a prepared scroll.
